title: Da Florian
tags: venice italy italia florian venezia piazzasanmarco stmarkssquare 意大利 veneto 威尼斯 caffèflorian stilllife cup water café table italian tray cappuccino saucer caffee caraffe
description: Venice, Caffè Florian, March 2014  Caffè Florian was established in 1720 and has been frequented by the likes of Goldoni, Casanova, Goethe, Byron, Dickens and Proust. One cappuccino cost €15, but, in all fairness, that included a €6 surcharge for the live music.
